description: # Lightweight Email Viewer вҖ” Product Specification **Project:** Read-only email client built with Next.js **Version:** 1.0 **Status:** Draft --- ## Overview A lightweight, read-only email viewer that surfaces messages stored in a PostgreSQL `emails` table. The app is tenant-scoped, meaning each authenticated user sees only messages belonging to their `tenant_id`. There is no compose, reply, or delete functionality in this version вҖ” the sole focus is fast, readable message browsing. --- ## Goals & Non-Goals **Goals** - Display a paginated, sortable inbox list for the authenticated tenant - Render individual messages with full header metadata and body content (HTML preferred, plain text fallback) - Support basic search and filtering - Handle attachments metadata display (no file download in v1) - Be fast вҖ” target < 200 ms server response on list queries **Non-Goals (v1)** - Compose, reply, forward, or delete - File attachment download - Multi-tenant admin views - Real-time push / WebSocket updates - Mobile-native UI (responsive web only) --- ## Database Schema (Reference) ```sql CREATE TABLE emails ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, message_id VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, sender VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, recipients JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', cc JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', bcc JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', subject TEXT, body_plain_text TEXT, body_html TEXT, received_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, attachments_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', raw_payload JSONB NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uq_emails_tenant_message UNIQUE (tenant_id, message_id) ); -- Indexes leveraged by this app -- idx_emails_tenant_id -- idx_emails_received_at -- idx_emails_tenant_received (composite вҖ” primary sort index) ``` **JSONB array shapes assumed** | Field | Element shape | |---|---| | `recipients` / `cc` / `bcc` | `{ "email": "...", "name": "..." }` | | `attachments_metadata` | `{ "filename": "...", "content_type": "...", "size": 12345 }` | --- ## Architecture ``` Next.js App Router (v14+) в”ңв”Җв”Җ app/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ (auth)/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ login/ # Auth entry point (outside scope вҖ” stub only) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ inbox/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx # Inbox list (Server Component) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ [id]/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ page.tsx # Message detail (Server Component) в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ api/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ emails/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ route.ts # GET /api/emails вҖ” list в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ [id]/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ route.ts # GET /api/emails/:id вҖ” single message в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ db.ts # pg / postgres.js client singleton в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ auth.ts # Session helper вҖ” exposes tenantId в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ emails.ts # Query functions в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ InboxList.tsx в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ MessageRow.tsx в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ MessageDetail.tsx в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ AttachmentBadge.tsx в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ SearchBar.tsx в””в”Җв”Җ types/ в””в”Җв”Җ email.ts # TypeScript interfaces ``` **Database client:** `postgres` (postgres.js) or `@vercel/postgres` вҖ” avoid an ORM to keep queries transparent and exploit the composite index directly. **Auth:** Any session mechanism that exposes `tenantId: string` (UUID). NextAuth, Clerk, or a custom JWT middleware are all acceptable. The spec assumes a `getSession()` helper returning `{ tenantId }`. --- ## Pages & Routes ### 1. Inbox List вҖ” `GET /inbox` **Purpose:** Paginated, reverse-chronological list of messages for the authenticated tenant. **URL Parameters** | Param | Type | Default | Description | |---|---|---|---| | `page` | number | 1 | Page number (1-indexed) | | `limit` | number | 50 | Rows per page (max 100) | | `q` | string | вҖ” | Full-text search across `sender` and `subject` | | `after` | ISO date | вҖ” | Filter messages received after this date | | `before` | ISO date | вҖ” | Filter messages received before this date | **SQL (core list query)** ```sql SELECT id, sender, subject, received_at, recipients, attachments_metadata, LEFT(body_plain_text, 200) AS preview FROM emails WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND ($2::text IS NULL OR sender ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%' OR subject ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%') AND ($3::timestamptz IS NULL OR received_at >= $3) AND ($4::timestamptz IS NULL OR received_at <= $4) ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT $5 OFFSET $6; ``` This query uses `idx_emails_tenant_received`. For full-text search at scale, promote `subject` and `sender` to a `tsvector` generated column with a GIN index. **UI Layout** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ рҹ“§ Inbox [Search...] [Filters] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Sender в”Ӯ Subject в”Ӯ Received в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ рҹ“Һ в”Ӯ alice@example.com в”Ӯ Q3 ReporвҖҰв”Ӯ Mar 1, 10:42 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ bob@example.com в”Ӯ Re: InvoвҖҰв”Ӯ Feb 28, 9:15 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ вҶҗ 1 2 3 вҖҰ вҶ’ ``` - Rows are clickable links to `/inbox/[id]` - Paperclip icon appears when `attachments_metadata` array is non-empty - Subject and preview text truncated to single line with `text-overflow: ellipsis` - Relative timestamps ("2 hours ago") with absolute tooltip on hover --- ### 2. Message Detail вҖ” `GET /inbox/[id]` **Purpose:** Full message view for a single email. **SQL** ```sql SELECT * FROM emails WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2 LIMIT 1; ``` The `AND tenant_id = $2` guard is mandatory вҖ” prevents cross-tenant access by ID enumeration. **UI Layout** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ вҶҗ Back to Inbox в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ Subject: Q3 Financial Report в”Ӯ в”Ӯ From: alice@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ To: bob@example.com, carol@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ CC: dave@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Date: March 1, 2026 at 10:42 AM в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ рҹ“Һ report.pdf (124 KB) рҹ“Һ data.xlsx (48 KB) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [Rendered HTML body or plain text fallback] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` **Body rendering rules** 1. If `body_html` is non-null, render inside a sandboxed `
title: Lightweight email client

Inbox List вҖ” `GET /inbox` **Purpose:** Paginated, reverse-chronological list of messages for the authenticated tenant. **URL Parameters** | Param | Type | Default | Description | |---|---|---|---| | `page` | number | 1 | Page number (1-indexed) | | `limit` | number | 50 | Rows per page (max 100) | | `q` | string | вҖ” | Full-text search across `sender` and `subject` | | `after` | ISO date | вҖ” | Filter messages received after this date | | `before` | ISO date | вҖ” | Filter messages received before this date | **SQL (core list query)** ```sql SELECT id, sender, subject, received_at, recipients, attachments_metadata, LEFT(body_plain_text, 200) AS preview FROM emails WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND ($2::text IS NULL OR sender ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%' OR subject ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%') AND ($3::timestamptz IS NULL OR received_at >= $3) AND ($4::timestamptz IS NULL OR received_at <= $4) ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT $5 OFFSET $6; ``` This query uses `idx_emails_tenant_received`. For full-text search at scale, promote `subject` and `sender` to a `tsvector` generated column with a GIN index. **UI Layout** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ рҹ“§ Inbox [Search...] [Filters] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Sender в”Ӯ Subject в”Ӯ Received в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ рҹ“Һ в”Ӯ alice@example.com в”Ӯ Q3 ReporвҖҰв”Ӯ Mar 1, 10:42 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ bob@example.com в”Ӯ Re: InvoвҖҰв”Ӯ Feb 28, 9:15 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ вҖҰ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ вҶҗ 1 2 3 вҖҰ вҶ’ ``` - Rows are clickable links to `/inbox/[id]` - Paperclip icon appears when `attachments_metadata` array is non-empty - Subject and preview text truncated to single line with `text-overflow: ellipsis` - Relative timestamps ("2 hours ago") with absolute tooltip on hover --- ### 2. Message Detail вҖ” `GET /inbox/[id]` **Purpose:** Full message view for a single email. **SQL** ```sql SELECT * FROM emails WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2 LIMIT 1; ``` The `AND tenant_id = $2` guard is mandatory вҖ” prevents cross-tenant access by ID enumeration. **UI Layout** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ вҶҗ Back to Inbox в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ Subject: Q3 Financial Report в”Ӯ в”Ӯ From: alice@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ To: bob@example.com, carol@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ CC: dave@example.com в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Date: March 1, 2026 at 10:42 AM в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ рҹ“Һ report.pdf (124 KB) рҹ“Һ data.xlsx (48 KB) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [Rendered HTML body or plain text fallback] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` **Body rendering rules** 1. If `body_html` is non-null, render inside a sandboxed `

summary:
## Summary: Lightweight Email Viewer

### Changes Implemented
- Added `isomorphic-dompurify` dependency for secure HTML email body rendering
- Extended `types/email.ts` with `EmailListItem`, `EmailListResponse`, and `EmailDetail` interfaces for inbox viewer
- Added `listEmails()` and `getEmailDetail()` query functions to `lib/email/emails.ts` with pagination, search (sender/subject ILIKE), and date range filtering
- Added `emailListQuerySchema` Zod validation schema to `lib/validators/schemas.ts` for query param validation (page, limit, q, after, before)
- Created `GET /api/emails` API route with authenticated, paginated, filterable email listing
- Created `GET /api/emails/[id]` API route with tenant-scoped email detail (excludes `raw_payload`)
- Built inbox list page at `/inbox` with search bar, date range filters, paginated email rows with attachment indicator, relative timestamps with absolute tooltip, and empty states
- Built message detail page at `/inbox/[id]` with full email headers (From, To, CC, BCC, Date), attachment badges with MIME type icons and file sizes, DOMPurify-sanitized HTML body rendering (or plain text fallback), and back navigation
- Added "Inbox" navigation item with inbox icon to SideNav (positioned first in nav order)

### Files Modified
- `package.json` / `package-lock.json` вҖ” added `isomorphic-dompurify` dependency
- `types/email.ts` вҖ” added `EmailListItem`, `EmailListResponse`, `EmailDetail` types
- `lib/email/emails.ts` вҖ” added `EmailAttachmentMetadata` import, `listEmails()`, `getEmailDetail()` functions
- `lib/validators/schemas.ts` вҖ” added `emailListQuerySchema` and `EmailListQueryInput` type
- `components/ui/SideNav.tsx` вҖ” added `InboxIcon` component, "Inbox" nav item, inbox route active state

### Files Created
- `app/api/emails/route.ts` вҖ” GET handler for paginated email list
- `app/api/emails/[id]/route.ts` вҖ” GET handler for single email detail
- `app/(app)/inbox/page.tsx` вҖ” inbox list page with search, filters, pagination
- `app/(app)/inbox/[id]/page.tsx` вҖ” email detail page with sanitized HTML rendering

### Notes for Developer
- HTML email bodies are sanitized server-side via `isomorphic-dompurify` with `<script>`, `<style>`, and `on*` event attributes stripped
- All queries enforce `tenant_id` scoping (user's session ID) to prevent cross-tenant access
- The inbox list query leverages the existing `idx_emails_tenant_received` composite index for performance
- No compose/reply/delete functionality per v1 spec вҖ” read-only browsing only
- Attachment badges are informational only (no download in v1)
- The `raw_payload` field is excluded from all API responses for security
- Build compiles successfully with TypeScript and Next.js
